subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! I read thy letter and was gratified by its contents, for they testified to thy firmness and steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه ات خواندم و از مضمون ممنون گشتم زیرا دلیل بر ثبوت و استقامت
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love and unity, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause
